nasb.text: So Ahaz slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David; and his son Hezekiah reigned in his place.

esv.text: And Ahaz slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David, and Hezekiah his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 亞哈斯和他的祖先一同長眠，葬在大衛城和他的祖先在一起。他的兒子希西家接續他作王。

ccb.text: 亚哈斯与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子希西迦继位。
